/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cutefishsystem_qmlplugins.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libcutefishsystem_qmlplugins.so -o libcutefishsystem_qmlplugins.so CMakeFiles/cutefishsystem_qmlplugins.dir/cutefishsystem_qmlplugins_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishsystem_qmlplugins.dir/wallpaper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cutefishsystem_qmlplugins.dir/plugin.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
